creator: BigBoss1964@gmail.com
text:
Just upgraded (via portmaster) devel/gettext and it's dependencies. Running evince now prints the following: /libexec/ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libintl.so.8" not found, required by "evince"

Fix: 

PORTVERSION bump of graphics/evince
How-To-Repeat: Install graphics/evince against an older version of devel/gettext, then upgrade gettext to the recent version ;)
